title: Zeph's Excavators
description: Lots of shovels that break 3x3 blocks at a time
body:
This mod adds some excavators that can break blocks in a 3x3 area.

Sneak while breaking to break 1x1.

Add mods with various ores to craft more excavators. (Copper, Tin, Nickel, etc.) [Miner's Minerals](https://modrinth.com/mod/miners-minerals) has everything you need to craft all excavators.

# Attention!

Requires [Ez Mod Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ezmodlib).
